headline: Trump, Japan Unveil Up to $40 Billion US Nuclear Reactor Plan
summary: GE Vernova and Hitachi to build SMRs in Tennessee and Alabama as Japan commits up to $33 billion to US gas projects.

raw.headline: Trump, Japan Unveil Up to $40 Billion US Nuclear Reactor Plan
raw.summary: GE Vernova and Hitachi to build SMRs in Tennessee and Alabama as Japan commits up to $33 billion to US gas projects.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

raw.headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 Facing Challenges

headline: US and Japan announce $40bn nuclear energy project
summary: The agreement forms part of a broader US-Japan fund aimed at strengthening energy and technology cooperation.
